competitive_position: Two things dominate. First and most urgent: the do-nothing / AI-readiness path is the real threat right now, because the POC has not yet produced a completed event and supplier responsiveness is the open question — if Zycus cannot make ANA work end-to-end on McAfee's spend, the status quo wins by default. Second: the peer POC vendor has never been named (Aitor, 17 October 2025), which blocks tailored positioning for the final review. PACTEM is a post-sourcing adjacency; Zip is dormant.

champion.source: Avoma discovery call 17 October 2025; Avoma demo 21 October 2025
champion.summary: Aitor Gonzalez is an active, agenda-driving champion, with Mazen El-Haidari a supportive second thread. Developed: strong advocacy and consistent two-way engagement through 29 June 2026. Missing: a proven bridge to the economic buyer and budget sponsorship.

items.area: Supplier responsiveness in live POC; 0 of 5 use cases completed end-to-end
items.quote: this could become a structural limitation
items.status: in progress — WhatsApp/SMS/email enhancements shared 29 June, relaunch with test suppliers underway

items.area: Economic buyer / budget owner unmapped and not engaged
Final executive go/no-go session date not locked
Commercial proposal committed 21 Oct 2025 still undelivered
items.quote: Request for range estimates on Anna licenses and integration fee
one or two vendors, and see the results

items.area: McAfee-specific quantified baseline / ROI not yet built
items.quote: Expressed need to ensure solution delivers measurable savings and pays off investment

recommended_moves: Make the relaunched POC complete at least one use case end-to-end: stand up the WhatsApp/SMS/email supplier-response enhancements on the test-supplier cases and confirm with Aitor exactly how the 'structural limitation' is being solved.

Build the McAfee-specific ROI from the first completed POC events — cost-per-event and buyer hours saved on McAfee's own data — so the business case rests on McAfee numbers, not 4-6% industry benchmarks.
Deliver the overdue ANA commercial proposal (spend-tier pricing + integration cost range), ~8 months outstanding, so budget validation runs in parallel with the POC rather than after it.

meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: No economic buyer is confirmed or engaged. A CFO meeting was referenced once (Next Step 11 June 2026) with no readout; a CEO/CIO ANA-video review (week of 24 June) is a validation session, not a commercial decision. Aitor controls the evaluation but is the transformation lead, not the budget owner, and explicitly gated commercial discussion on ROI (17 October 2025: 'we're not going to invest into something that there's no ROI'). The committee is procurement-only (Aitor, Mazen, Nick). The 'executive session w leadership' remains TBD. Best Case is indefensible without a mapped, sponsoring EB.
